channel.title: Jbang on Kaoto | Free and Open Source Integration Editor for Apache Camel
channel.description: Recent content in Jbang on Kaoto | Free and Open Source Integration Editor for Apache Camel

item.title: Rapid Prototyping with Camel JBang and Kaoto
item.description: On the following video we can see how to run your integration using Camel JBang dev mode.
